changelog: Fix: Delete backup no longer fails with 'database is locked' — added 8s SQLite busy_timeout on write connections
Fix: Clear Stale Jobs now correctly uses read-write DB connection (was using read-only, silently failing)
Fix: Duplicate React key crash when file backup id and image backup id collide — now uses type-prefixed composite key
Fix: Clear Stale Jobs now force-completes stuck DB records (running=NULL, complete=1) instead of only sending stop signal
